General.Name: Eminence Enterprise Ltd
General.Description: Asset Chain Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property investment and development activities in Hong Kong, and Singapore. It operates through Property Investment, Property Development, Investment in Securities and Others, and Loan Financing segments. The company owns and invests in residential, commercial, and industrial properties. It also provides commercial and personal loans. The company was formerly known as Smart Chain Company Limited and changed its name to Asset Chain Limited in February 2026. Asset Chain Limited was founded in 1981 and is based in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong. Asset Chain Limited is a subsidiary of Goodco Development Limited.
General.Address: Hong Kong Spinners Building, Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong
